title: CI baseline: shellcheck + sh -n + markdownlint
description: Add .github/workflows/ci.yml that runs shellcheck -s sh on install.sh + uninstall.sh, sh -n syntax smoke, and markdownlint on docs. Trigger: push to main and pull requests. No deploy pipeline.

title: Docs baseline
description: Stage A of roadmap execution: add LICENSE, CHANGELOG, CONTRIBUTING, SECURITY, ARCHITECTURE, TROUBLESHOOTING, GitHub issue/PR templates. Brings project-hygiene docs up to the level the README and ROADMAP already assume.
close_reason: All 9 docs files landed in commit bdc15d3 and pushed to origin/main. Stage A of ROADMAP execution plan is complete.
